roadmap.goal: Add a named cycle-time selection to the Flow Overview Cycle Time Percentiles widget (Team + Portfolio). Slice 01 (FE-only) lifts the selection to BaseMetricsView mirroring cumulativeScopeDefinitionId, adds a compact selector to CycleTimePercentiles, fetches named percentiles via the EXISTING cycleTimePercentiles?definitionId endpoint, branches RAG to neutral under a named selection (D11/ADR-100), and makes View Data's highlight column + row filter follow the selection (D15/D16). Slice 02 (BE+FE) threads an additive definitionId through cycleTimePercentilesInfo (Team + Portfolio) with a _Def_{id} cache segment (D12/ADR-101) so the trend footer follows the named selection, then wires the FE. The slice-02 backend acceptance scaffold NamedCycleTimeTrendInfoApiIntegrationTest.cs already exists [Ignore]-marked and RED-ready; DELIVER un-ignores it and completes the Portfolio seed.

validation.notes: 5 steps across 2 slices. Slice 01 is frontend-only against shipped endpoints (selector/RAG/ViewData), slice 02 is the one contract change (trend definitionId + cache segment) whose backend AC is pre-scaffolded RED in NamedCycleTimeTrendInfoApiIntegrationTest.cs. Every DISTILL scenario (feature-delta 'Scenario list with tags' #1-19 + WS) maps to a step: #1-9 -> 01-01, #10-13 -> 01-02, WS/#8/#9 -> 01-03, #14-19 -> 02-01, US-03 FE footer -> 02-02. No orphan scenarios. Step sizing follows the shipped Epic 5251 slice-04 reference class (cumulative-chart-scope-switch). E2E kept as its own step (01-03) because it runs live Playwright locally and is slow. Portfolio parity asserted in both 01-03 (FE) and 02-01 (scaffold #19).

out_of_scope: workItemAgePercentiles, cycleTimePbc, per-definition SLE (D14) - not named in 5509.
Scatterplot / CycleTimeScatterPlotChart change - it keeps its own local selection (D13, no cross-tab coupling).
Persisting or sharing the selection across tabs or reloads.
EF migration - read-path + FE only; D11 rejects per-definition SLE so no schema change.
The lighthouse-clients version-gate gap on definitionId forwarding - unreachable today, tracked separately (ADR-101 SS5 caveat, not fixed in 5509).

phases.name: Slice 01 - Flow Overview cycle-time selector (frontend only)
phases.description: Lift selection to BaseMetricsView, add selector to CycleTimePercentiles, neutral RAG, View Data column + filter, E2E walking skeleton. No backend change.

steps.name: Lifted selection, selector, named percentiles, neutral RAG
steps.description: Lift percentilesScopeDefinitionId + handler to BaseMetricsView (mirror cumulativeScopeDefinitionId); add a compact controlled MUI Select to CycleTimePercentiles header slot; fetch named percentiles via existing getCycleTimePercentiles(...,definitionId); branch RAG to ragStatus:'none' + SLE-anchoring tip for named. Vitest.
steps.scenario_name: US-01 AC1-9 (feature-delta scenarios #1-9): selector defaults to Default listing named definitions; select named recomputes 50/70/85/95 >= default; neutral RAG + tip; Default byte-identical; no definitions => no selector; not premium => no selector; invalid definition self-resets; scatterplot selector untouched
criteria: Selector renders in the widget header, defaults to Default, lists named definitions; early-returns null when definitions list is empty or not premium.
Selecting a named definition fetches via existing getCycleTimePercentiles(id,start,end,definitionId); Default path percentiles unchanged (byte-identical).
Named selection => RAG ragStatus 'none' + SLE-anchoring tip; Default selection => today's computeCycleTimePercentilesRag unchanged.
Selected definition going invalid/absent self-resets selection to Default via useEffect; no crash; scatterplot local selection untouched.
Full pnpm test green; pnpm build clean (zero TS/Biome errors and warnings); conventional commit feat(metrics).

steps.name: View Data column and row filter follow selection
steps.description: In buildViewData(): under a named selection the highlight column title = definition name, value = item.namedCycleTimes value (D15), rows filtered to items carrying that definition's value (D16, count == percentile population), no SLE line. Default selection unchanged (item.cycleTime, all closed items). Vitest.
steps.scenario_name: US-02 AC1-4 (feature-delta scenarios #10-13): Default => cycle-time column over all closed items; named => definition-named column from namedCycleTimes, no new fetch; rows == named population (count matches percentiles); no SLE line for named
criteria: Default selection: highlight column titled with cycle-time term shows item.cycleTime over all closed items - unchanged from today.
Named selection: column titled with definition name, value from item.namedCycleTimes for that definitionId; no new fetch issued.
Named rows filtered to items carrying a value for the definition; row count equals the percentile population (D9/D16).
Named selection: no SLE line drawn in the dialog (D11 consistency).
Full pnpm test green; pnpm build clean; conventional commit feat(metrics).

steps.name: E2E walking skeleton - Team and Portfolio
steps.description: Playwright POM: on demo data, select 'Lead Time (End to End)' on Flow Overview Cycle Time Percentiles; percentiles re-plot, RAG neutral; scatterplot selector still Default after switching to Flow Metrics tab; Portfolio behaves identically. Add POM methods on MetricsPage.ts. Run live locally before commit.
steps.scenario_name: Feature-delta WS + scenarios #2/#8/#9: delivery lead selects Lead Time (End to End) => percentiles re-plot + neutral RAG (demo data); Portfolio parity; scatterplot selector still Default (no cross-tab coupling)
criteria: Spec drives testWithDemoData, selects 'Lead Time (End to End)' via a POM method (no inline page.locator in the spec).
Asserts percentiles re-plot and RAG footer reads neutral under the named selection.
Asserts scatterplot selector still reads Default after switching to Flow Metrics (no cross-tab coupling).
Portfolio Flow Overview asserted to behave identically to Team scope.
Playwright run green locally before commit; conventional commit test(metrics).

phases.name: Slice 02 - Trend follows the named selection (backend + frontend)
phases.description: Additive definitionId on cycleTimePercentilesInfo (Team + Portfolio) with a _Def_{id} cache segment; named service branch calls GetNamedCycleTimePercentiles twice; un-ignore the RED backend scaffold and complete the Portfolio seed; wire the FE trend footer.

steps.name: Backend trend definitionId, named branch, cache segment
steps.description: Add [FromQuery] int? definitionId=null to GetCycleTimePercentilesInfo (Team + Portfolio controllers) via the IsNamedRequest idiom; service named branch calls GetNamedCycleTimePercentiles twice (current+previous) feeding BuildCycleTimePercentilesInfoDto; cache key gains _Def_{id}. Un-ignore NamedCycleTimeTrendInfoApiIntegrationTest.cs and author the Portfolio seed helper.
steps.scenario_name: US-03 AC1-5 (feature-delta scenarios #14-19): definitionId absent => default trend unchanged; named current-period P85 == sibling named percentiles; named+default same range DO NOT collide in cache; two definitions each own comparison; invalid id mirrors sibling path; Portfolio twin no collision
criteria: cycleTimePercentilesInfo (Team + Portfolio) accepts optional definitionId via IsNamedRequest; absent/0 returns the default trend unchanged.
Named branch calls GetNamedCycleTimePercentiles for current + previous period into BuildCycleTimePercentilesInfoDto; invalid id yields empty series (sibling parity, no new error contract).
Cache key gains a _Def_{id} segment so named and default trends for the same range do not collide (values differ, not merely non-null).
All 6 scaffold tests un-ignored and green including the completed Portfolio seed helper (no Assert.Fail placeholder).
dotnet build zero warnings; dotnet test green; conventional commit feat(metrics).

steps.name: Frontend trend footer follows named selection
steps.description: getCycleTimePercentilesInfo(id,start,end,definitionId?) gains the definitionId suffix mirroring getCycleTimePercentiles; the percentiles-widget trend footer source uses the lifted selection so a named selection shows that definition's current-vs-previous comparison; Default byte-identical. Vitest.
steps.scenario_name: US-03 FE wiring: getCycleTimePercentilesInfo forwards definitionId when named; trend footer under a named selection reflects the named comparison; Default footer byte-identical to today
criteria: getCycleTimePercentilesInfo appends &definitionId only when a named definition is selected; Default call unchanged.
The percentiles widget trend source follows the lifted selection so named shows the named comparison; Default footer byte-identical.
Vitest covers the named-forwarding and Default-unchanged cases.
Full pnpm test green; pnpm build clean (zero TS/Biome errors and warnings).
Conventional commit feat(metrics).
